name: Chicken/Cabbage/Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chicken Ramen Noodles, broken up and cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Chicken Ramen Noodles according to package instructions and break them up.
2. Mix the contents of the Ramen seasoning packet with 1/3 cup oil, 1/3 cup sugar, and 1/3 cup vinegar in a bowl until well combined.
3. Add the chopped cooked chicken breast, sliced scallions, shredded green cabbage, and any optional shredded carrots to the bowl.
4. Pour the seasoned mixture over the cooked noodles and mix gently until everything is evenly coated.
5. Transfer the salad to a serving dish and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
6. Gently stir the salad before serving.
This salad is great for lunch or dinner. Enjoy!
